name: Pel
description:
It’s a Sprunki AU where Wanda has a lost brother named Pel. Pel is basically an opposite to Wenda, while he’s charming, friendly and even passive, he’s also very autiscally traumatised. He just doesn’t know it yet.

Pel resembled Wenda but he had six whiskers on his face, three on each side of his cheeks, He has black goo over his arms and legs and his chest seems to be cracking. His right eye is a black eye with a white pupil, with cracks coming out of his right face. He has a sharp tail.

Pel is a fan made OC for Sprunki.

Appearance: Pel is a tall mutated grey sprunki cat that is very tall. He has black goo over his arms and legs and his chest seems to be cracking. Pel’s right eye is a black eye with a white pupil, with cracks coming out of his right face. He has a sharp tail. If it were up to me, he’d wear a tattered hoodie with dark pants and fingerless gloves.

although, he does have a horror form. In this form, his face contorts, his ears become longer, his mouth becomes longer, both of his eyes have cracks around them, and he also a heart-shaped hole in his chest. He grows 20 more arms, 10 on each side, and his neck becomes longer than usual. He only enters horror mode when his own rage takes over his innocence, turning him into that form.

Height: 18.4 Ft tall

Family/Relatives: Wenda(sister)

Allies; Wenda, Grey

Enemies: none

Age; 15.

TRIVIA:

- The reason Pel looks like this is because he was born with it. His appearance was a rare mutation.

- Pel’s teeth is rather crooked and wretched from being locked in the basement for so long.

- Pel was born with a mutation, that’s why he looks like that.

- Pel is really a powerful omniversal god, he just doesn’t know it yet due to his autism.

- he’s aware of Gray’s existence. And frankly likes Gray because he knows Gray is the perfect BF for Wenda.

- Pel knows Wenda and Gray are dating, and really doesn’t give a care.

- the reason he was locked in the basement was because of his mutations at birth, everybody thought he was a mother but Pinki chose to persuade them to let Pel live.

- Pel thinks 3 - 1 = 26.

- Pel actually looks like what he does.

- Pel is Oxaya to Wenda’s Jimmy.

- Pel is the original grey.

- Pel wants love.

- he doesn’t hate everybody, he’s too innocent

- He survived in the basement for his entire life by eating on food supples inside the basement.

- Pel is autistic.

- Pel’s name is derived from the word “Pencil”, with nci in Pencil being removed to leave Pel.

- if he ever broke out of the basement, that’s up entirely to you.

- Pel’s lore takes place where Wenda and Gray were dating (GRENDA)

SPRUNKI TAGS: ignore these

SPRUNKI is a scratch mode for the music creation game Incredibox created by NyankoBfLol # . Characters with simple, colorful, and diverse designs appear and play their own parts.

Oren wears Orange with light orange headphones with a tuft of hair facing down at the right side and two antennae. He has a little smug and relaxed expression on his face.

Raddy is a demon-like figure with 5 dark red spikes on his head, as well as an irritated or angry expression.

Clukr has grey skin and an antenna with two hooks on the end, with a silver cymbal upon the top of his head. He also seems to be looking up at the cymbal above his head.

Fun Bot is a blue-eyed robot that has a silver head and body, a gold visor with a black screen, and two light yellow antennas with gold circles on the tips. He has a blue mouth on a black screen similar to his visors and below them. He also has two gold plates on his torso.

Vineria appears as a green figure with one dark green horn and flowering vines on her head meant to resemble hair. The flowers in her vines are pink. And the insides of the flowers are yellow. She also has dark green eyeshadow bearing a laid-back expression.
